categories.notes: No Button.tsx — class-based `.btn` / `.btn-*` is the standard (ADR-032 §5).
Shared: SelectInput from ui/form. Domain selects (FairEntitySelect, AdapterSelect) are OK wrappers.
Shared form kit under components/ui/form (+ legacy FormField.tsx re-export).
ADR-032: UniversalDataTable → WidthResponsiveDataTable. DataTableShell scroll-only for specialty grids.
Shared: FilterPanel. Local `.filters` toolbars are non-standard if not FilterPanel.
Shared Card component only. Bare class token `card` on raw elements is a P1 violation.
PageHeader for pages; SectionHeader for nested sections.
Shared Banner (success/warning/error/info). No parallel toast system. Field-level `.form-error` stays with FormField.
